ancestries.name: Dwarf
ancestries.description: Brave, stalwart folk as sturdy as the stone kingdoms they carve inside mountains.

trait.name: Stout
trait.description: Start with +2 HP. Roll hit points per level with advantage.

ancestries.name: Kobold
ancestries.description: Tiny, humanoid dog-lizards with a penchant for tinkering, trap building, and a hint of magic.

trait.name: Knack
trait.description: You get +1 to spellcasting checks or may begin each session with a luck token.

ancestries.name: Elf
ancestries.description: Ethereal, graceful people who revere knowledge and beauty. Elves see far and live long.

trait.name: Farsight
trait.description: You get a +1 bonus to attack rolls with ranged weapons or a +1 bonus to spellcasting checks.

ancestries.name: Goblin
ancestries.description: Green, clever beings who thrive in dark, cramped places. As fierce as they are tiny.

trait.name: Keen Senses
trait.description: You can't be surprised.

ancestries.name: Halfling
ancestries.description: Small, cheerful country folk with mischievous streaks. They enjoy life's simple pleasures.

trait.name: Stealthy
trait.description: Once per day, you can become invisible for 3 rounds.

ancestries.name: Half-Orc
ancestries.description: Towering, tusked warriors who are as daring as humans and as relentless as orcs.

trait.name: Mighty
trait.description: You have a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls with melee weapons.

ancestries.name: Human
ancestries.description: Bold, adaptable, and diverse people who learn quickly and accomplish mighty deeds.
languages: One additional common language of your choice

trait.name: Ambitious
trait.description: You gain one additional talent roll at 1st level.

ancestries.name: Kahnjauru
ancestries.description: A humanoid with large, powerful legs.

trait.name: Jump
trait.description: You jump near range. You have advantage on checks related to jumping.

ancestries.name: Leprechaun
ancestries.description: A small pointy-eared sprite with a nose for treasure.

trait.name: Treasure Hunter
trait.description: You can detect treasure through barriers within double near range.

ancestries.name: Living Statue
ancestries.description: A magical humanoid made of bronze, stone, or crystal. You have broken free of your creator's control.

trait.name: Magical Construct
trait.description: You do not eat, breathe or drink. Hostile spellcasting checks that target you have disadvantage.

ancestries.name: Lycan
ancestries.description: A supernatural lycanthrope hybrid werewolf.

trait.name: Impervious
trait.description: You take half damage from non-magical sources.

ancestries.name: Mantian
ancestries.description: A humanoid with insect features and four arms.

trait.name: Secondary Arms
trait.description: The additional arms cannot be used to hold a shield, wield a weapon, or cast spells.

ancestries.name: Shapeshifter
ancestries.description: A human that can transform into an animal.

trait.name: Transform
trait.description: As an action, select one animal you can transform into for one hour. Your stats and size stay the same. Animal shapes you can change into are: ape, badger, bat, bear, bird, boar, cat, fish, frog, octopus, rat, snake, and wolf.

ancestries.name: Tri'Telk
ancestries.description: A supernatural humanoid with a third telekinetic eye.

trait.name: Telekinesis
trait.description: You can move an object slowly within far range weighing 1 gear slot or less. You can communicate telepathically with any creature within near range.

ancestries.name: Undead
ancestries.description: A humanoid that has risen as the undead, but retains their intelligence.

trait.name: Fortitude
trait.description: You do not need to eat, drink, breathe or sleep. You still need to do nothing for 8 hours to get the benefits of a rest.

ancestries.name: Gnome
ancestries.description: Diminutive, elusive tricksters who delight in playful pranks. As clever as they are tiny.

trait.name: Trickster
trait.description: 1/day, target one creature to become the object of your nettlesome pranks, you can force a re-roll on one attack or check.

ancestries.name: Chelonian
ancestries.description: Contemplative, wise turtle beings who act with caution and carry their homes on their backs.

trait.name: Armored Shell
trait.description: You gain +1 to AC

ancestries.name: Dragonborn
ancestries.description: Proud descendants of dragons whose honor holds greater value than their own lives.

trait.name: Breath Weapon
trait.description: 1/day, unleash a breath weapon based on your draconic heritage via ranged attack, dealing 1d8 damage to a near-sized cube in near range.

ancestries.name: Forest Elf
ancestries.description: Slender, patient elves who are one with nature and uneasy amidst urban bustle.

trait.name: Forest Footwork
trait.description: In a forest, you can move up to near again without skipping an action on your turn.

ancestries.name: Half Troll
ancestries.description: Ugly, burly beasts who easily anger and struggle to find their place within humanoid society.

trait.name: Regenerate
trait.description: Regain 1 HP per hour unless damaged by fire or acid.

ancestries.name: Shadow Elf
ancestries.description: Lithe, stealthy offspring of drow who have embraced the surface as their home.

trait.name: Friend of the shadows
trait.description: When shrouded in darkness, monsters attack your allies first.

ancestries.name: Tiefling
ancestries.description: Devout, self-reliant outcasts who have diabolic ancestry and sport demonic horns.

trait.name: Heatsight
trait.description: 1/day you can see the heat signatures of living creatures for 3 rounds.

ancestries.name: Mycellan
ancestries.description: Peaceful mushroom folk who connect with their natural environment through the mycelial network and telepathy.

trait.name: Telepathic
trait.description: Once per day, release rapport spores to gain telepathic communication with all in a near radius. Lasts for 10 rounds.

ancestries.name: Risen
ancestries.description: Resurrected heroes, chosen to fulfill their purpose even in undeath.

trait.name: Corpse Walking
trait.description: At 0 HP you remain active but are still dying. Someone else must stabilize you. You die early if you receive your full HP of damage again.

ancestries.name: Slimefolk
ancestries.description: Oddly-shaped humanoids made of congealed slime who have chosen to coexist with solids.

trait.name: Slime Form
trait.description: You can freely alter your shape to mimic other humanoids. 1/day you can also morph into a puddle of goo for 3 rounds. Puddle speed is halved and equipment does not morph.

ancestries.name: Skurrid
ancestries.description: Furry ratfolk, as tall as elves, famed for their role in citywide subterranean vermin networks.

trait.name: Vibrating Whiskers
trait.description: If you focus, you sense living beings within near of you, even through doors.

ancestries.name: Sylvaren
ancestries.description: Botanical beings with leaves, vines and/or berries growing from their humanoid forms.

trait.name: Plant Medicine
trait.description: Take 2 damage to sprout a healing berry on your body. Eating it will heal 1 HP.
